summary_en: エムアップＨＤ announced a material dividend change (dividend hike). Reframes the return-of-capital baseline.
summary_jp: エムアップＨＤが配当方針変更を開示（増配）。資本還元基準が刷新。

summary_en: エムアップＨＤ authorized a share buyback. Direct return of capital and a signal management views shares as undervalued.
summary_jp: エムアップＨＤが自己株式取得を決議。資本還元と株価評価のシグナル。

summary_en: エムアップＨＤ authorized a share buyback. Direct return of capital and a signal management views shares as undervalued.
summary_jp: エムアップＨＤが自己株式取得を決議。資本還元と株価評価のシグナル。
